items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of the scenario 'Auto-offer when cancellation occurs'. However, there is no direct evidence provided that confirms whether this specific scenario was executed or what the outcome was. The evidence primarily focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, leaving a gap in the validation of this particular scenario.
